ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Melzi, Dizionario di opere anonime e pseudonime, vol. I, p. 63, he published I sogni d`Euterpe as Accademico Infecondo, and under his brother`s name Antonio.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
